_comment: SigMap configuration — all keys are optional (defaults shown). Copy to gen-context.config.json.
_srcDirs_comment: Source directories to scan. OMIT this key to use auto-detection (recommended).
_srcDirs_comment2: Auto-detection reads package.json/go.mod/Cargo.toml and scans top-level dirs automatically.
_srcDirs_comment3: Only set this explicitly if auto-detection misses part of your project layout.
_maxTokens_comment: Used only when autoMaxTokens is false. Override to pin a fixed budget.
_autoMaxTokens_comment: Auto-scale budget based on repo size. Default: true.
_coverageTarget_comment: Fraction of source files to target for inclusion (0.0–1.0). Default: 0.80 = 80%.
_modelContextLimit_comment: Model context window size (tokens). Hard cap = modelContextLimit × maxTokensHeadroom.
_maxTokensHeadroom_comment: Fraction of model context reserved for SigMap output. 0.20 = 25,600 token hard cap.
_strategy_full: full       — single file, all signatures, always injected (default)
_strategy_per_module: per-module — one .github/context-<module>.md per srcDir + thin overview
_strategy_hot_cold: hot-cold   — recently changed files injected; rest in context-cold.md (MCP)
_hotCommits_comment: Only used by hot-cold strategy: how many recent commits count as 'hot'
_depMap_comment: Include a compact import dependency map at the top of the output (~50-100 extra tokens)
_changes_comment: Include compact recent git changes section
_changesCommits_comment: How many recent commits to analyze for the changes section
_testCoverage_comment: Append function-level coverage hints (✓/✗) by scanning tests
_testDirs_comment: Directories used when testCoverage is enabled
_impactRadius_comment: Append reverse dependency hints in file headers (used by: ...)
